Custom Banner Printing Online - Vinyl, Mesh & Fabric Banners for Business & Outdoor Use

Premium UV-Resistant Banner Materials with Fast Custom Printing & Nationwide Delivery

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Selection Material Options Finishing Options Production Time Design Method Quantity PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Banners for Professional Business Advertising & Outdoor Installations

Get high-quality custom banners printed on premium materials for business advertising, outdoor promotions, and event displays. Choose from durable vinyl banners (13 oz matte/gloss, 18 oz heavy-duty), wind-resistant mesh banners (8 oz perforated), or professional fabric banners for trade shows and indoor use.

All banners feature UV-resistant inks for long-lasting color, weather-resistant construction, and professional finishing including heat-welded hems and grommets. Perfect for storefronts, construction sites, fence installations, grand openings, and seasonal promotions.

Professional Banner Materials Available:

  • Vinyl Banners: 13 oz matte, 13 oz gloss, or 18 oz extra-heavy-duty vinyl for bold outdoor graphics
  • Mesh Banners: 8 oz perforated vinyl that allows wind flow - ideal for fences and scaffolding
  • Fabric Banners: Lightweight polyester with wrinkle-resistant finish for indoor displays
  • Canvas Banners: Premium cotton canvas for artistic displays and eco-friendly applications

Professional Installation Options:

Standard finishing includes heat-welded hems and grommets placed every 2-4 feet. Additional options include reinforced hems, reinforced corners, and pole pockets for secure mounting and professional display.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Banner Materials for Professional Outdoor & Indoor Applications

Choose from professional-grade banner materials designed for durability, weather resistance, and vibrant print quality.

Vinyl Banner Materials:

  • 13 oz Scrim Vinyl (Matte): Standard outdoor material with semi-matte finish - ideal for general business signage
  • 13 oz Scrim Vinyl (Gloss): Premium glossy finish that enhances color vibrancy for high-impact displays
  • 18 oz Extra Heavy-Duty Vinyl: Maximum durability for long-term outdoor installations and harsh weather conditions

Mesh Banner Material:

  • 8 oz Perforated Vinyl: Wind-flow design reduces stress on mounting hardware - perfect for fence banners, construction sites, and scaffolding installations

Fabric Banner Materials:

  • Polyester/Nylon Blend: Lightweight, wrinkle-resistant material ideal for trade shows, retail displays, and indoor events
  • Cotton Canvas: Premium eco-friendly material for artistic displays and sophisticated indoor applications

All materials use UV-resistant inks and are designed for professional installation with multiple finishing options available.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Banner Finishing for Secure Installation & Long-Term Durability

Professional finishing options ensure your banners install securely and withstand weather conditions.

Standard Finishing (Included):

  • Heat-Welded Hems: Reinforced edges provide extra strength and prevent tearing
  • Grommets: Nickel-plated brass grommets placed every 2-4 feet around perimeter for secure hanging

Upgrade Finishing Options:

  • Reinforced Hems: Double-layer hem construction for maximum durability in high-wind installations
  • Reinforced Corners: Extra material at corners prevents stress tears during installation
  • Pole Pockets: Sewn sleeves for pole mounting - available on top, bottom, or sides
  • Double-Sided Printing: Full-color graphics on both sides for maximum visibility

Installation Hardware:

Grommets accommodate standard bungee cords, zip ties, or rope for versatile installation on fences, buildings, poles, and frames. Pole pocket finishing allows for clean professional mounting on banner stands and pole systems.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Production Times & Rush Service Options

Choose production timing that fits your project schedule and deadline requirements.

Standard Production Options:

  • 1 Day Priority: Next business day completion for urgent banner orders
  • 2 Day Express: Two business day production for quick turnaround projects
  • 3 Day Standard: Three business day production - most popular option
  • 5 Day Saver: Economical production timing for advance planning

Production Process:

Production begins after artwork approval and payment processing. Digital proof review is available for custom designs. Rush production may be available for select products - contact customer service for availability.

Large Format Capabilities:

Print banners up to 16 feet wide by 50 feet long with consistent production timing. Large format orders receive the same professional finishing and quality control as standard sizes.

Production times exclude shipping transit. Select appropriate shipping method to meet your installation deadline.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Payment Methods & Ordering Options

Secure payment processing with multiple options for individual and business customers.

Credit Card Processing:

  • Visa, MasterCard, Discover, and American Express accepted
  • Payment processed after artwork approval for proof orders
  • Online design orders without proof requests are processed immediately
  • Secure SSL encryption protects payment information

Alternative Payment Methods:

  • Check Payments: Personal and business checks accepted - must clear before production begins
  • Government Purchase Orders: Accepted from City, State, County, and Federal agencies plus all Military branches
  • Corporate Accounts: Net terms available for qualified business customers

Payment Processing:

All orders require payment before production begins. Credit card charges occur after proof approval ensures accuracy. Government and corporate accounts follow established billing terms.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Shipping Options & Nationwide Delivery Service

Professional packaging and reliable shipping ensure your banners arrive safely and on schedule.

Shipping Speed Options:

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days - cost-effective for advance planning
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days - most popular delivery option
  • Three Day Shipping: 3 business days guaranteed delivery
  • Two Day Express: 2 business days for time-sensitive installations
  • Overnight Express: Next business day delivery available nationwide

Shipping Process:

Orders ship after artwork approval and payment processing. Rush shipping services coordinate with rush production for fastest possible delivery. Large format banners ship in protective tubes to prevent damage.

Delivery Coverage:

Nationwide shipping to all 50 states. Shipping costs calculated by package weight and selected delivery speed. Tracking information provided for all shipments.

Contact customer service for freight delivery options on oversized banner orders.

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Banner Printing

Do you offer fast turnaround and shipping for custom banners?

Yes—overnight (1 business day) shipping is available nationwide, and you can choose Economy (5–10 business days), Standard (3–5), Three Day, or Two Day at checkout. Orders ship after artwork approval and payment are received, and select products offer rush production.

What materials do you use, and which are best for outdoor use?

We print on 13 oz scrim vinyl (standard), 13oz premium gloss, 18oz extra heavy-duty matte, plus mesh, fabric, and canvas. For outdoor use, vinyl is the most popular all-around choice and mesh is best for windy locations.

What sizes are available for banners and trade shows?

We offer standard sizes like 2'x4', 3'x6', and 4'x8', plus custom dimensions. For trade shows, popular options include retractable banners, step-and-repeat backdrops, and table throws.

Do you offer custom birthday or event banners?

Yes—create one using our online designer and templates, upload a print-ready file, or work with a designer for a custom layout. Customers commonly order banners for birthdays, graduations, retirements and baby showers.

Do you offer bulk discounts or volume pricing?

Yes—we offer bulk discounts for larger orders for businesses, agencies, schools, and organizations. Contact us with sizes, quantities, and deadlines for a custom quote.

Are your banners weatherproof and waterproof?

Our vinyl and mesh banners are weather-resistant and designed for outdoor use with proper finishing and installation, and we offer options like grommets, pole pockets, and reinforced hems/corners. Standard finishing includes heat-welded hems and grommets, with grommets typically placed every 2–4 feet depending on banner size.

How do I clean a vinyl, mesh, fabric, or canvas banner?

Clean vinyl and mesh banners with mild soap and water using a soft cloth, then rinse and air-dry completely before storing. For fabric or canvas banners, gently spot-clean and avoid harsh chemicals, abrasives, pressure washing, or high heat to protect the print.

Finishing Options for Vinyl Banner Installation & Mounting

Vinyl Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all banners to increase durability.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners. All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Vinyl Banners

What vinyl banner material should I choose: 13 oz vs. 18 oz?

13 oz vinyl is lighter and great for most indoor and outdoor uses. 18 oz vinyl is extra heavy-duty and ideal for harsher outdoor conditions and longer-term use.

How long do vinyl banners last outdoors?

Our 13 oz vinyl material is intended to last 3–5 years when used outdoors and 7–10 years when used indoors.

Are vinyl banners weatherproof and UV-resistant?

Yes! Vinyl banners are printed on durable, weather-resistant vinyl which is designed to brave most elements.

What's the best banner for windy locations?

Mesh banners are best for high-wind areas because they allow air to pass through, reducing stress on the banner and mounting hardware.

Do I need hems, and when?

Hems add strength and durability. They're recommended for outdoor use, windy environments, or larger banners.

Do vinyl banners come with grommets?

Yes. Our standard finishing option includes heat-welded hems with grommets placed in all four corners and every 2–4 feet around the banner perimeter. You can use bungee cords and hanging clips to help secure your banner.

How are grommets placed, and can I choose placement?

Standard grommet placement includes the corners plus spacing approximately every 30 inches around the edges. Custom placement is not recommended because exact positioning cannot be guaranteed.

Can I order custom sizes or shapes?

Custom sizes are available. Custom shapes are limited to square or rectangular banners.

What are pole pockets, and what size do I need?

Pole pockets are sewn sleeves that allow a pole or rod to slide through for hanging. Choose the size based on your pole diameter and display method:

  • 2" Pole Pocket: Fits a pole up to 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pocket: Fits a pole up to 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pocket: Fits a pole up to 1 1/2" in diameter

What finish should I choose: gloss or matte?

Gloss enhances color vibrancy, while matte reduces glare and improves readability under bright lighting or at angles. Matte is the most popular choice among customers.

Can vinyl banners be used indoors and outdoors?

Yes. Vinyl banners are designed for both indoor and outdoor use. Outdoor lifespan depends on sun exposure, wind conditions, and installation method.

What file types and resolution work best for printing?

Print-ready PDFs work best. Use high-resolution artwork (typically 150+ DPI at final size) and convert fonts to outlines when possible.

Will I receive a proof before printing?

Yes. If requested, we will email a proof for your approval prior to printing.

How do I hang a vinyl banner securely?

Use bungee cords through the grommets and maintain even tension. Avoid over-tightening, as this can cause tearing in windy conditions.

What is the best way to clean my vinyl banner?

Use lukewarm water and mild dish soap. Avoid abrasive materials, power washers, or stiff brushes, and use soft towels to protect the printed surface.

How do I best store my banner to keep reusing it?

Roll the banner with the printed side facing outward, store it in its original box, and keep it away from extreme heat or direct sunlight.

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Fabric Banners

What is a fabric banner?

A fabric banner is a soft, textile-based banner (often polyester) printed with your design. It's popular for events because it looks premium, photographs well, and reduces glare compared with many vinyl banners.

When should I choose a fabric banner instead of a vinyl banner?

Choose fabric when you want a more upscale look, less reflection under lights, and easier folding or packing for travel. Vinyl is often preferred for heavy outdoor use where maximum weather resistance is the priority.

Are fabric banners good for outdoor use?

Fabric banners can be used outdoors for short periods, but they perform best indoors or for temporary outdoor events. Wind, rain, and prolonged sun exposure can shorten their lifespan compared with outdoor-grade vinyl.

Do fabric banners wrinkle, and how do I remove wrinkles?

Yes, fabric banners can wrinkle during shipping or storage. Wrinkles are usually reduced by hanging the banner; if needed, use low heat or steaming with a protective layer and follow care instructions.

Can I wash or clean a fabric banner?

Light spot-cleaning is typically safest. Washing methods depend on the fabric and ink used, so always follow product care guidelines to avoid shrinking, color shift, or fraying.

Will a fabric banner be see-through?

Opacity depends on fabric weight and lighting conditions. Most display fabrics reduce show-through, but strong backlighting can make lighter fabrics appear more transparent.

Can fabric banners be printed double-sided?

No. Fabric banners are printed on one side only. Double-sided printing is available for select vinyl banner options.

What's the best resolution for fabric banner artwork?

Aim for 150 DPI at full size for best results. For very large banners viewed from a distance, 100–150 DPI at final size is generally acceptable.

What file format should I upload for the best print quality?

Print-ready PDFs are the most reliable option, with fonts outlined or embedded. Vector formats (AI or EPS) are ideal for logos, while high-quality PNG or JPG files can work if resolution is sufficient.

How much bleed and safe area should I include?

Most fabric banners require bleed to ensure color reaches the edge after finishing. A common setup is 0.125–0.25 inches of bleed, with important text or logos kept at least 2–3 inches from the edges.

What finishing options are best for hanging a fabric banner?

Grommets are common for wall or ceiling hanging, while pole pockets are ideal for use with rods or crossbars. Hems help reinforce edges and improve durability.

What size fabric banner should I choose for my space?

Choose size based on viewing distance and placement. Smaller banners work well for entrances or tabletop displays, while larger sizes are better for backdrops and trade show branding.

How do I hang a fabric banner without damaging it?

Use hardware that matches the finishing, such as hooks for grommets or rods for pole pockets. Avoid over-tensioning and do not puncture the fabric.

How do I store a fabric banner so it lasts longer?

Store the banner clean and completely dry. Folding is fine for travel, while rolling helps reduce creases. Keep it in a bag or tube away from heat and direct sunlight.

How long do fabric banners last?

With proper care, fabric banners can last a long time indoors. Outdoor use or high-wear environments will shorten lifespan depending on exposure, handling, and installation.

Double-Sided Banner Materials for Outdoor Durability

Made from premium vinyl, our double-sided banners are designed for durability and feature double-sided printing that prevents bleed-through and maintains clarity on both sides. Double sided banners are two separate banners that are hemmed and put together back-to-back. They are adhered using heat and grommets. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Double-sided banners are rated for indoor and outdoor use and can be printed up to 6' by 30'. They are printed in full color.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application.

Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Frequently Asked Questions About Double-Sided Banners

What is a double-sided (two-sided) banner?

A double-sided banner is printed on both sides so your message is readable from either direction.

How are double-sided banners made (will graphics show through)?

Double-sided banners are made as two separate vinyl banners that are hemmed and finished back-to-back, helping prevent bleed-through and keep both sides clear.

Are double-sided banners good for indoor and outdoor use?

Yes. Double-sided banners are rated for both indoor and outdoor use.

What is the maximum size you can print?

Double-sided banners can be printed up to 6' × 30'.

Are double-sided banners printed in full color?

Yes. Double-sided banners are printed in full color.

Where are your double-sided banners made?

All double-sided banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

What material options are available for double-sided banners?

You can choose from 13 oz matte vinyl, 13 oz gloss vinyl, or 18 oz vinyl.

What's the difference between 13 oz matte, 13 oz gloss, and 18 oz vinyl?

13 oz matte vinyl is a low-shine and popular option with a rich color gamut. 13 oz gloss vinyl offers a higher shine for vibrant, crisp graphics. 18 oz vinyl is an extra heavy-duty matte option with a blockout coating for added durability and print quality.

What finishing options are available?

Double-sided banners are available with hems & grommets, hems only, or pole pockets (2", 3", or 4").

What pole size fits each pole pocket?

A 2" pole pocket fits a 3/4" diameter pole, a 3" pole pocket fits a 1 1/4" diameter pole, and a 4" pole pocket fits a 1 1/2" diameter pole.

Do pole pockets change the finished banner size?

No. Selecting pole pockets does not increase the finished size of your banner.

How close can text or logos be to the edge with pole pockets?

For best results, avoid placing text or important images within 3 inches of the edge when selecting pole pockets.

Is there a size limit for finishing double-sided banners?

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. For larger sizes, please contact customer service.

Do you offer wind slits?

No. Wind slits are not offered.

Can the finished size vary?

Yes. Vinyl is temperature sensitive, so size can fluctuate due to printing, finishing, and climate conditions. Acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (for example, a 5' banner may vary by up to 2.5").

Order Custom Standard Size Banners for Indoor & Outdoor Display Applications

Vinyl banners are printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl banner material. The scrim vinyl is a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength. You can use banners indoor and outdoor for many different occasions.

Vinyl banners are digitally-printed in full color. You can select one of our banner templates to customize in the online designer with backgrounds, clip-art and text. You can also upload your own images.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

Standard Banner Material Options for Indoor & Outdoor Durability

Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.
13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.
18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.
Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.
Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.
Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

Finishing Options for Standard Size Banner Installation

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2-4 feet. A thick, weblike material (similar to what is used in seatbelts) is heat-welded to the perimeter of the banner to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to the corners of the banner and secured with grommets to improve both the strength and durability in the corners of the banner. A pocket or sleeve added to the banner to allow for a dowel or pole to run through it for support. When selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of the banner.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over to the backside of the banner and heated together to form a clean and strong one-inch hem. We recommend having hems for all banners to increase the strength and durability of the banner.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your banners:

Top and Bottom Only Hems - This is our standard finishing option for vinyl banners. The top and bottom of every banner will be heat welded and grommeted. All Four Sides Hems - This is another common finishing option for vinyl banners. All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2 inches, 3 inches, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner. The vinyl banner material is folded over the backside of the banner similar to hems, but there is room for a pole or rod to go through the pocket.

You will have the following pole pocket finishing options for your banners:

  • 2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3", or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets.

**Pole Pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners. Reinforced corners are not available on banners under 2 feet in height.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for the banner. The corners have a reinforced hem and are grommeted to each corner of the banner. You cannot have reinforced corners with pole pockets.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a 1 3/16" PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner. The vinyl banner is cut to size, and the reinforcements are heat-welded to the backside of the banner.

We recommend having reinforced hems and reinforced corners on banners over 32 square feet that will be used outdoors or if the banner will be used in a high-wind environment.

**You can not have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. For anything larger, please contact us. Double-sided banners can only have pole pockets or hems and grommet finishing.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

**We do not recommend wind slits in banners, therefore, we do not offer them. For more information as to why, visit our wind slit banners information page.

Shipping Options for Standard Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Indoor & Outdoor Applications for Standard Size Banners

From 1 to 50 feet long, these banners are completely customizable for any job, operation, or event. These standard size banners are the bread and butter of display ads.

Choose between three vinyl banner material options: heavy-duty 18-oz vinyl, 13-oz premium matte, or 13-oz premium gloss.

The extra heavy-duty 18-oz option offers increased durability and resilience. It is perfect for those who want to display banners outdoors for a long period of time. Our 13-oz options will still provide ample durability indoors and outdoors, though it is not designed for harsh weather.

If you intend to use your banner indoors, then we suggest ordering it in the matte finish. We suggest this option because interior lighting tends to glare or glint off of gloss finished banners. However, both finishing options are perfectly suitable for indoor and outdoor use. If you choose to create a custom banner with mesh or fabric material, you will be redirected to the corresponding pages. Some common uses for these banners are personalized church banners, custom school banners, & event banners!

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our customer service team regarding our products or services.

Artwork Requirements for Standard Banner Printing

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Frequently Asked Questions About Standard Size Banners

What are standard size banners?

Standard size banners are commonly ordered banner dimensions, typically printed on vinyl and available in multiple materials. Sizes can range from smaller banners (like 1' × 1') up to large banners (up to 8' × 50').

What standard vinyl banner sizes do you offer?

Standard sizes range from 1' × 1' up to 8' × 50'. Common options include 2' × 4' (24" × 48"), 3' × 5' (36" × 60"), 3' × 6' (36" × 72"), and 4' × 8' (48" × 96").

What size banner should I choose for my viewing distance?

As a general rule, increase banner size as viewing distance increases. For close-range messaging, 2' × 4' or 3' × 5' is common; for farther viewing, 3' × 6' or 4' × 8' is often used.

What material are they made of?

Standard size banners are available in multiple materials, including 13‑oz premium vinyl (matte or gloss), 18‑oz extra heavy‑duty vinyl, PVC polyester mesh, and polyester fabric. If you'd like help choosing a material, contact our customer service team.

What's the best material for outdoor standard-size banners?

For longer-term outdoor use, 18‑oz extra heavy‑duty vinyl is a top choice for durability. For windy locations, mesh is ideal. For short-term outdoor or indoor use, 13‑oz vinyl is a popular option.

Matte vs. gloss vinyl: which finish should I pick?

Matte helps reduce glare under indoor lighting. Gloss can look more vibrant and high-contrast. Both finishes can be used indoors or outdoors—glare and appearance are the main differences.

What is the thickness of your banners?

Standard size vinyl banners are available in 13‑oz and 18‑oz options. The 13‑oz vinyl is a popular choice for indoor and outdoor use.

Do these banners come double-sided?

Yes. Double‑sided banners are available in 13‑oz gloss, 13‑oz matte, and 18‑oz extra heavy‑duty vinyl. Maximum double-sided print size is 6' × 30'.

What finishing should I choose: hems and grommets or pole pockets?

Hems and grommets are the most common and flexible option for general installs. Pole pockets are best when you plan to slide the banner onto a pole or crossbar for a clean presentation.

How do I install my banner?

Hems and grommets or pole pockets can be added. If you select grommets, we recommend using ball bungees on all grommets provided to distribute tension for a cleaner hang. Standard grommets are 1/2" in diameter. Pole pockets come in 2", 3", and 4"; avoid placing text or important images within 3" of the banner's edge when choosing pole pockets.

Do you have recommended file types and resolution for printing?

For best results, upload print-ready PDF or EPS files when possible, or a high-resolution JPG. High-quality artwork helps text and logos print cleanly at full size.

Should I include bleed and a safe area in my design?

Bleed is not needed on artwork files for banners, but it is always good to have a safe area of at least 2–3 inches to keep important text/logos away from the edges and finishing areas (like grommets or pole pockets) to help avoid trimming or coverage issues.
